name: Ladybuggy
description: The tank mount of Grounded 2. It hatches from 1 Ladybug Egg, 3 Chrysalis Leather, and 4 Black Ant Part, turning the normal ladybug into a heavy support mount with a water cannon, busting shoves, and more durability than any other buggy.
behavior: It does not move as fast as the spider or haul as brutally as the ants, but it outlasts every other mount and can keep firing while advancing. Its natural pattern is to absorb pressure, hold mid-range, and use its body to shove once something gets too close.
interactionWithPlayer: The rider can move and fire at the same time through its water cannon. It can also roar to heal 160 health, refill water from any source or a filled canteen, and continue building or carrying medium resources while mounted.
interactionWithCreatures: It works best as an anchor against groups and flying enemies. Water shots are especially good at knocking flyers around, pushing lighter targets back, and clearing both natural and enemy-made Tang puddles.
strategy: Use the cannon to control spacing and erase Tang before fully committing. Once the front line closes in, Shove doubles as both a tier 1 busting tool and a melee panic button, while the long heal animation pays off in drawn-out fights.
respawnInfo: Incubation: 12 hours inside the Hatchery. Only one buggy can be active at a time. If you do not revive it within 90 seconds, it returns to its nest and becomes unavailable for 5 minutes.

combatStats.attackDamageSummary: Water shot: 12 damage, 2 stun, and 20 extra against flyers. Shove: 92 busting damage and 20 stun. Heal: restores 160 health.

inflicts: The cannon fires water while its close shove deals busting damage.
specialTraits: Clears Tang puddles with its water cannon.
Has the highest health of all buggies.
Can carry materials, but less than the ant buggies.

abilities.name: Heal
abilities.description: Performs a long animation and heals 160 health. Costs 3 stamina bars.

abilities.name: Water Cannon
abilities.description: Fires water while the rider keeps moving. It holds 120 shots and can be reloaded at water sources or with a filled canteen.

abilities.name: Shove
abilities.description: A body check that deals 92 busting damage, 20 stun, and also breaks tier 1 busting nodes. Costs 3 stamina bars.

abilities.name: Water Burst
abilities.description: A short chain of shots used to harass flyers and clear contaminated ground.

abilities.name: Front Sweep
abilities.description: A short close-range sweep used to push enemies back and reset the fight when you get boxed in.
